\tzpentry{ID4502}{Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4502 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}[\psi] = \frac{1}{2}\partial_\mu\psi^\dagger\partial^\mu\psi - V(\psi) + \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{int}}(\psi,A_\mu,g_{\mu\nu}) + \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{TZP}}(\psi) + \mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{Furiene}}(\psi), \end{equation}
